title: Brownie Buena Delight
description: A rich, fudgy brownie paired with crunchy buena for a delightful dessert.
instructions: Line an 8-inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
Melt the butter and sugar in a medium saucepan over low heat.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the eggs until well combined.
Add the flour and cocoa powder, stirring until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
Top with brownie and bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick comes out with a few moist crumbs.
Let cool completely in the pan before cutting into squares.
Sprinkle chopped buena on top before serving.
